name: implementation-plan
description: SDLC implementation-planning phase: decompose requirements (and design if present) into a task-plan.json with ordered task items, priorities, estimates, and role assignments. Verifies dependency integrity via the task-plan-ready gate.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

params.message: Task plan v{{task_extraction.version}} ({{task_extraction.task_count}} tasks) produced at {{task_extraction.draft_path}} (ready={{task_extraction.task_plan_ready.passed}})
